title: jugeni decisions audit log entry (v1)
description: Append-only audit log entry for decision lifecycle events. One JSON object per line in JSONL format. Location on disk: <repo>/.jugeni/decisions/audit.jsonl. Hash chain fields (prev_hash, entry_hash) are roadmap (v2); v1 entries omit them and consumers MUST tolerate their absence and their later presence as a forward-compatible addition.

ts.description: ISO 8601 timestamp with timezone offset, e.g. '2026-06-23T14:07:00+02:00'. Local time is preserved (NOT normalized to UTC) so the audit log surfaces the operator's wall-clock context.

action.description: Lifecycle transition performed on the decision. The state machine: propose → accept → lock (forward), accept|lock → reject (terminal), accept|lock → supersede (replaced by another decision), reject → reopen → propose|accept (rescued). Each entry records ONE transition.

decision.description: Decision identifier. Format: D-YYYY-MM-DD-NNN where YYYY-MM-DD is creation date and NNN is monotonic counter within that day (zero-padded to at least 3 digits). Stable across the entry's lifetime.

detail.description: Free-form operator note attached to the transition. Often empty for routine transitions; populated when --reason flag is passed at CLI. NOT machine-parseable; treat as documentation. Encoding: UTF-8.
examples: supersedes due to schema change Y
